title: pseuderanthemum alatum
intro: Pseuderanthemum alatum, also known as winged pseuderanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to tropical regions, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pseuderanthemum alatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, and can also be incorporated into ointments and salves for topical use.
